de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.intermediate

Class AppNodeIntermediate

  • java.lang.Object

      • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.intermediate.AppNodeIntermediate

extends NodeIntermediate
    Node in an intermediate proof representation storing a rule application.

    Dominic Scheurer
